ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model (e.g., decision trees, random forests, neural networks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Git commit hash associated with the version */,
  "parent_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent version (for versioning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, F1 score, AUC) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula for calculating the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version being evaluated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being used */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, pandas dataframe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "pair_description" TEXT /* Description of the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_pairs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_pairs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access grant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who granted access */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when access was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access grant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who granted access */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when access was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
